extensionDescription.message: Ukulungiswa kobuchwepheshe kwe-Arabic typography kuzo zonke izizindanethi. Kulungisa isikhala sezinhlamvu, kufaka amafonti amahle esi-Arabhu, futhi kulungisa izinkinga zokunikezela ezibangela umbhalo wesi-Arabhu uhlukane.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Nika amandla noma ukhubaze isandiso se-Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Isikhala sezinhlamvu sisolwa sisethiwe ku-0 ukuvimbela ukuhlukana kwezinhlamvu zesi-Arabhu. Lokhu kuyimbangela evame kakhulu yokunikezelwa kwesi-Arabhu okuphukile kuwebhu.

forceRTLDescription.message: Iphoqa isiqondiso sokunene-kuya-kwesokunxele kumabhulokhi ombhalo wesi-Arabhu. Nika amandla kumasayithi lapho isi-Arabhu sibonakala ngokungalungile ukusuka kwesokunxele-kuya-kwesokunene.

diacriticsDescription.message: Ithuthukisa ukunikezelwa kwezimpawu zokamisa zesi-Arabhu (tashkeel) ukuvimbela ukunqunyulwa ngenhla nangaphansi komugqa wombhalo.

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Khetha ifonti ehlukile yale sayithi kuphela, unqobe ukukhetha kwakho kwefonti yomhlaba wonke.

fontSourceNote.message: Amafonti anikezwa ama-Google Fonts. Kudinga ukuxhumana kwe-inthanethi ukulayisha kokuqala.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Izicelo zefonti zithunyelwa kumaseva e-Google. Bheka fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: Umbhalo wesi-Arabhu utholiwe — izakhi eziyi-$COUNT% zilungisiwe.

statusGlobalMode.message: Kusetshenziswa imodi yomhlaba wonke — izibaluli ze-lang/dir zitholiwe.

statusNoArabic.message: Awukho umbhalo wesi-Arabhu otholiwe kuleli khasi.
